content: We can hypothesize that integrating multi-perspective reflection mechanisms from Topic B can resolve a core limitation of Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative refinement: when Self-Refine often gets stuck in local optimization loops by only refining an initial output from the same starting perspective the LLM used to generate it, because the LLM cannot spot blind spots inherited from its original generation context. Pulling in inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms lets Self-Refine break out of these loops without adding any training or external data.
